message:
kafka: add Producer trait import and remove unused_async suppression

Add the rdkafka::producer::Producer trait import (cfg-gated behind the
"kafka" feature) which is needed for calling trait methods like
flush() and send() on the ThreadedProducer. This prepares the kafka
module for the transition from Phase 0 stubs to real rdkafka calls.

Remove the now-unnecessary #![allow(clippy::unused_async)] inner
attribute — as the module gains real async implementations, the lint
suppression is no longer appropriate and would mask legitimate warnings
about async functions that don't actually await.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
